task: Stephen helped George move into the apartment. He brought several friends to assist with the heavy furniture.
The candle illuminated the dark hallway. It flickered gently in the cold draft.
implementations: The pronoun "It" refers to "the dark hallway".

task: Vanessa praised Felicia for the presentation. She had worked tirelessly on the slides.
The detective questioned the witness about the incident. He had been at the scene that night.
Patricia called her aunt on the phone. She wanted to confirm the dinner plans for Sunday.
The weaver finished the tapestry after months of work. It depicted scenes from local mythology.
Henry visited Roger at the hospital. He had been recovering from surgery for several weeks.
The librarian shelved the encyclopedia. It belonged in the reference section near the entrance.
Rebecca thanked Joanne for the help. She had stayed late to finish the report together.
